title: i don't know if you know #sr
description: Lyrics from i don't know if you know #sr
body:
lyrics

i don't know if you know #sr
but there's nowhere else to go
so i sit here and sow
waiting for my trees to grow
then i'll sit here and sew
waiting for a breeze to blow
in my ship i can row
when the sailing gets to slow

i don't know if you know
but i've been here before
and i'll be back around
while my wheels touch the ground
it used to get me down
but not i really dig the sound
i found my flow

i sing this and unbirthday suit #sr to noble at bedtime
